name: AscoBreastCancerGuidelineRecommendationR15SurgeryDelay
title: Offer neoadjuvant systemic therapy when surgery is delayed
description: Initial multidisciplinary treatment planning for invasive nonmetastatic breast cancer.

action.description: Use neoadjuvant systemic therapy when delaying surgery is preferable or unavoidable.

documentation.citation: Neoadjuvant systemic therapy may be offered when surgery is delayed for testing, reconstruction planning, or other decision-making needs. Evidence: korde-et-al-2021-neoadjuvant-chemotherapy-endocrine-therapy-and-targeted-therapy-for-breast-cancer-asco-guideline_pdf: The Bottom Line, Recommendation 1.5

action.title: Offer neoadjuvant systemic therapy when surgery is delayed
